subcodes.first_line: O my God, my Lord, and my Master! Thou seest the Wronged One amidst the heedless ones among Thy creatures who have turned away from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا الهی و سیدی و مولای تری المظلوم بین الغافلین من خلقک الذین اعرضوا عن
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @suffering and imprisonment, @prayers (general or uncategorized)
